ideation: This animation sequence portrays a police officer in a confident and alert posture.  The animation will focus on the arms, conveying attentiveness and readiness to act. Frame 1 shows a neutral stance, with hands resting at the sides, establishing a baseline. Frame 2 will have the left arm slightly raised, hand near the hip, suggesting a relaxed alertness. Frame 3 brings the right arm up slightly, as if gesturing or signaling, emphasizing readiness and authority. Frame 4 will then move the right arm down. Frame 5 returns to the neutral stance.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, neutral stance
left arm slightly raised, hand near hip, alert
right arm gestures outward, signaling authority
right arm lowers, ready to act
arms return to neutral, watchful stillness
